name: studioops
longDescription: Install and run a local-first AI software delivery workflow. StudioOps turns ideas into structured projects and tasks, routes work through isolated builders and specialist reviews, assembles approved changes in non-production QA, and keeps releases under human control.
starterPrompts: Set up StudioOps for this project.
Turn this mockup into StudioOps tasks.

availability.notes: Select only regions where Codex plugins, the publisher identity, support, privacy notice, and terms are ready.
